overview.description: The iShares Emerging Markets Bond Active ETF (BREM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed, diversified portfolio of hard currency emerging market bonds. Issues may be of any duration and credit quality BREM was launched on Oct 15, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
